creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153994
svn diff for dns/sleuth

I like this tool, and since it's not currently
maintained, thought I'd like to take it on.

Changes; bring it up to current ports tree standards:

Makefile - adds LICENSE, MAINTAINER, with slight addition to COMMENT
pkg-message - add ${PREFIX}, move to files/ where it belongs

That's it!

Please find the svn diff, attached, to accommodate this.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
